programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Germany where he meets modern-day victims of a beast that has been on the prowl in these waters for the past 700 years. (HD)
A wedding reception goes off with a bang, when a fishing trawler careers off track. Elsewhere, Adam has a difficult choice to make, and there's a new arrival at the hospital. (HD)
An activist, a barrister, a renowned pundit, Joe Brolly opens up in a rare and emotional interview about his life, his trauma, and his football controversies. (HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
Hosted by Emma Willis and comedian Tom Allen, we pair eight celebrities with professional chefs who mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateurs to restaurant-level cooks. (HD)
In the second part of this fascinating discussion, Mick McCarthy opens up about life as a manager, taking the Ireland job twice and the infamous relationship with Roy Keane. (SL,HD)
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines (HD)
Gift wrapped is a fun quiz which sees four couples compete to win their perfect gift list. Each couple builds a unique list by selecting their own personal dream prizes. (HD)
One of Leinster's brightest young prospects, Ian McKinley's life was rocked when he lost sight in his eye with a horrific rugby injury. (HD)
After breaking into the Premier League as a 19-year-old, it took Damien Delaney 11 years to make it back to the top. The former Crystal Palace defender opens up on his journey. (SL,HD)
The day-to-day activity of the UCD Veterinary Hospital as they attempt to restore movement to a French Bulldog's back legs and care for a wild seal with a damaged eye. (HD)
From monstrous sharks to killer catfish, his investigations are as varied and challenging as ever. Jeremy travels the world to uncover a range of underwater assassins. (HD)
Emma Willis & Tom Allen host with eight celebrities, each paired with an accomplished chef who will mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateur to restaurant level chefs. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
Jason Manford hosts the general knowledge quiz show in which the four contestants can always give an answer - but can they give an unbeatable answer? (HD)
A woman is unaware that the home she inherited from her father has a $400,000 outstanding loan; a woman is sued for allegedly abetting a scammer in defrauding others. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)
